div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Haiti (Sparks)
div.p: 177. Minister Lescot was told in an informal conference that the Department would interpose no objections if the Haitian Government should present a request to the Foreign Bondholders Protective Council for a reduction in the interest rate on Haiti’s dollar bonds from 6 percent to 4 percent.

Lescot indicated that he would inform his Government of this fact with a recommendation that a statement be prepared by his Government, presumably with the assistance of the Fiscal Representative, for submission to the Council.
